name: ah-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant browse Albert Heijn products, Bonus deals, cart, orders, lists, and receipts.

name: SupermarktConnector
description_en: Lets a script or agent query Albert Heijn and Jumbo product and price data via their mobile APIs.

name: mcp-picnic
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search Picnic groceries and manage the cart, orders, and deliveries.
